## What this changes

One or two sentences describing the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./... -race -count=1` passes locally
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Design doc updated if this changes the contract of an existing milestone
- [ ] Commit message describes the why, not just the what

## Context (optional)

Related issue, Slack thread, or design discussion.
